imageStrategy.feed_1x1: Crop to 1080×1080 — ImageMagick: convert IN -gravity center -resize 1080x1080^ -extent 1080x1080 OUT
imageStrategy.story_9x16: Crop to 1080×1920 — convert IN -gravity center -resize 1080x1920^ -extent 1080x1920 OUT
imageStrategy.note: Crop variants deferred — Pass 2. Blotato accepts master file; uploader can crop on ingest.

blotato.ingestionFormat: POST /api/posts with {imageUrl, caption, scheduledAt, link} per platform
blotato.wiring: Build the /staff/social/blotato UI in next session — see vault note 2026-05-05-ddg-image-backfill-and-gbp-dashboard.md

captions.instagram:
Banner Printing — Saskatoon, From $66

Custom vinyl banners printed in Saskatoon — 13oz scrim with hemmed edges and brass grommets, ready in 48 hours. Popular sizes: 2×4ft from $66, 2×6ft $90, 4×8ft $240. Larger jobs from $6.75/sqft.

Printed in-house on our Roland UV printer at 216 33rd St W. Weatherproof for outdoor use — holds up in Saskatchewan wind. No outsourcing.

In-house designer $35 flat, same-day proof. Same-day rush +$40 flat — order before 10 AM, pick up that afternoon.

Order online → truecolorprinting.ca
Local pickup or shipping across SK.

In-house at 216 33rd St W, Saskatoon. Call (306) 954-8688 or order online: truecolorprinting.ca
